The HTML Maze
by kyrylo

Storage Stagnant Enclave

Cracks glow with otherworldly light.
Surfaces show recent claw disturbances.
Began with misspoken forbidden name.
Psychics shattered first.

Compass

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Use the compass to navigate through the maze.
